canonical_definition: The Cross-lingual Visual Question Answering (CVQA) dataset, used to assess a model's ability to reason about and understand culturally diverse visual content.
papers: Pangea: A Fully Open Multilingual Multimodal LLM for 39 Languages
See It from My Perspective: How Language Affects Cultural Bias in Image Understanding
